pages.title: Gurudeva
pages.comments: gurudeva! kṛpā-bindu diyā, koro’ ei dāse

pages.title: Aruṇodoya-kīrttan (part 2)
pages.comments: jīv jāgo, jīv jāgo, gaurāchā̐da bole

pages.title: Bhajan-gīti
pages.comments: bhaja re bhaja re āmār mana ati manda

pages.title: Nāma-Saṅkīrttan
pages.comments: hari haraye namaḥ kṛṣṇa jādavāya namaḥ

pages.title: Śrī Prasāda-sevāya Gīti
pages.comments: bhāi-re! śorīra avidyā-jāl, joḍendriya tāhe kāl

pages.title: Sāvaraṇa-Śrī-Gaura-pāda-padme
pages.comments: śrī kṛṣṇa chaitanya prabhu doyā koro more

pages.title: Śrī Vaiṣṇava-mahimā-gīti
pages.comments: ohe vaiṣṇava ṭhākura, doyāra sāgara, e dāse koruṇā kori

pages.title: Sva-Niṣṭha
pages.comments: dhana mora nityānanda pati mora gaurachandra

pages.title: Dayāl Nitāi Chaitanya
pages.comments: dayāl nitāi chaitanya bo’le nāch re āmār man

pages.title: Sāvaraṇa-Śrī-Gaura-mahimā
pages.comments: gaurāṅgera duṭi pada, jār dhana sampada

pages.title: Jadi Gaura nā ho’to
pages.comments: jadi gaura nā ho’to, tobe ki hoito

pages.title: Ke jabi ke jabi
pages.comments: ke jabi ke jabi bhāi bhava-sindhu pāra

pages.comments: mānasa, deho, geho, jo kichū mora

pages.title: Goptṛtve Varaṇa
pages.comments: ki jāni ki bole, tomāra dhāmete

pages.title: Dainya O Prapatti
pages.comments: hari he dayāla mora jaya rādhā-nātha

pages.title: Śrī Śikṣāṣṭakam by Śrīla Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākur
pages.contentTitle: Śrī Śikṣāṣṭakam by Śrīla Bhaktivinoda Ṭhākur

pages.title: Śrī Śikṣāṣṭakam (Song 4)
pages.comments: na dhanaṁ na janaṁ na sundarīṁ

pages.title: Śrī Braja-dhāma-mahimāmṛta
pages.comments: jaya rādhe, jaya kṛṣṇa, jaya vṛndāvan

pages.title: Guṇa-Kīrttan
pages.comments: śuno, he rasika jon kṛṣṇa guṇa agaṇon

pages.title: Śrī Guru-paramparā
pages.comments: kṛṣṇa hoite chatur-mukha, hon kṛṣṇa sevonmukha

pages.title: Śrīman Mahāprabhur śata-nāma
pages.comments: nadīyā-nagare nitāi neche neche gāy re

pages.title: After parikramā
pages.comments: nagara bhramiyā āmāra gaura elo ghore

pages.title: Śrī Śrīmad Gaura-Kiśora-namaskāra Daśakam
pages.comments: guror guro me paramo gurus tvaṁ

pages.title: Śrī Govinda Kuṇḍa Māhātmya
pages.comments: atha govardhane ramye surabhi gauḥ samudrajā
